rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the component type scope when contracts reference component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in the component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Preserve AADL architecture by not using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks in the most specific valid scope for the referenced features
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions; use exposed ports or constants instead
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not place contracts in scopes where referenced features are not visible
